svg.title: Sub-F: Tube Routing Channels — Engineering Drawing
svg.text: Cartridge Tray Floor Features — Third-Angle Orthographic Projection
Material: PETG | All dimensions in mm | Channels integral to tray (Sub-A)

g.text: 1. All four channels are geometrically identical in cross-section (10mm wide x 10mm deep).
2. Channel walls are integral to tray floor (monolithic print, no assembly).
3. One snap clip per channel at Y=23 midpoint. Tabs overhang 2mm, leaving 6mm gap.
4. Tube snaps past tabs with 0.175mm interference per side (6.35mm OD vs 6.00mm gap).
5. Channel arc radius: R=30mm (above 25mm min bend radius for 1/4" silicone tubing).
6. Pump 1 pair (A+B) and Pump 2 pair (C+D) converge toward X=80 at fitting end.
7. Tube is removable from clips with moderate finger force (~2-5 N) for Tier 2 service.
